T2.name: 对话中心主界面

phase_name: Phase T — TUI OpenDev 整合
key_decisions: 类型统一：直接使用 octo-types + AgentEvent，零适配层
布局：对话中心 + 浮层调试，废弃 12-Tab 多屏
对接：与 REPL 共用 AgentExecutorHandle
完整特性：无 mock/stub，全部真实 engine 数据
回退策略：feature branch 开发，每 Task 一个 commit
notes: T2 COMPLETE (6c5ac02): All 7/8 tasks done (T2-6 autocomplete deferred). Created TuiState (app_state.rs), render layout (render.rs), key handler (key_handler.rs), approval dialog, TUI entry point (run_tui_conversation), event loop with AgentEvent handler, and deleted legacy 12-Tab architecture (screens/, backend.rs, 6065 lines removed). 2205 workspace tests pass (delta: -45 from deleted legacy tests). Next: T3-1 debug overlays.
